title: Purpose-scope resolveTier: cli tier resolves for gathers only, typed refusal for cell execution (B1)
action: Per B1 (validation-slice-2a.md) and the design settled in plan.md 2A-ii (incl. the validation scope-split note): give resolveTier an optional 4th param `purpose` accepting {for:'gather'|'cell'}, DEFAULT 'cell' (fail-safe). Behavior: (1) when the resolved slot value is cli-shaped AND effective purpose is 'cell' (including every existing 3-arg call, a missing/null purpose, and ANY malformed/unknown purpose value), return {type:'refused', reason:'cli_tier_gather_only', slot, fix:'declare {for:"gather"} for a read-only gather; cli cell execution stays refused until a cell-execution dogfood is green (plan 2A/W9)'} — a returned type, NEVER a throw (this sits under the bee-model-guard hot path via modelForTier, which must keep returning null for cli with zero behavior change). (2) An explicit {for:'gather'} returns {type:'cli', command} exactly as today. (3) Non-cli values (inherit/model/budget) ignore purpose entirely — byte-identical results. The refusal applies to EVERY slot including 'review'. Update the JSDoc to document the 4th param, the refusal type, and the default's rationale. Update BOTH existing test rows that expect a bare call to yield type 'cli': (a) test_lib.mjs:2203 `resolveTier(eRoot, 'generation')` — change to the FULL 4-arg call `resolveTier(eRoot, 'generation', 'claude', {for:'gather'})` (purpose is the 4th positional param; runtime must be spelled out); (b) test_lib.mjs:2264-2265 `resolveTier(rRoot, 'review')` on a cli review slot — change the expectation: the bare 3-arg call now asserts type 'refused' with reason 'cli_tier_gather_only', and ADD a companion row asserting `resolveTier(rRoot, 'review', 'claude', {for:'gather'})` returns type 'cli' with the same command (the external-reviewer path stays reachable via gather purpose; routing prose moves to 4-arg in 2A-iii). Add new rows: default-purpose refusal on a cli generation tier, explicit {for:'cell'} refusal, {for:'gather'} allow, malformed purpose (string 'banana', number, null, non-object) => refusal not throw, modelForTier on a cli generation config still returns null and does not throw, refusal object carries reason 'cli_tier_gather_only'. Mirror .bee/bin/lib/state.mjs byte-identical. Regenerate the release manifest (node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write) in this cell.

truths: resolveTier(root, slot, runtime) with a cli-shaped slot value returns {type:'refused', reason:'cli_tier_gather_only'} — the boundary is code, not prose
resolveTier(root, slot, runtime, {for:'gather'}) with the same config returns {type:'cli', command} unchanged
malformed purpose values fail safe to refusal and never throw
modelForTier behavior is byte-for-byte unchanged (null for cli, model string otherwise); hooks/test_model_guard.mjs stays green untouched
non-cli tier values resolve identically with and without purpose
artifacts: updated resolveTier + JSDoc in both state.mjs copies (byte-identical)
new/updated test rows in test_lib.mjs covering all truths
prohibitions: no throw on any input shape — this is fail-open hook-adjacent code

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: resolveTier(root, slot, runtime, purpose) gains an optional 4th purpose param {for:'gather'|'cell'}, default 'cell' fail-safe; a cli-shaped slot resolved for cell (default, explicit, or malformed purpose) returns {type:'refused', reason:'cli_tier_gather_only', slot, fix} — a typed refusal, never a throw. Only explicit {for:'gather'} still returns {type:'cli', command}, applied to every slot including 'review'. modelForTier and non-cli tiers are byte-unchanged. Both state.mjs copies mirrored byte-identical, test_lib.mjs rows updated + added, release manifest regenerated.
